sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, created_at) VALUES (1, parseDateTimeOrZero('2023-10-08 12:00:00'));
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, created_at) VALUES (2, parseDateTimeOrZero('invalid-date'));
SELECT id, parseDateTimeOrZero(created_at) AS safe_created_at FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_dates SET created_at = parseDateTimeOrZero('2022-05-14 08:30:00') WHERE id = 2;
